componentDescription: OTPInput renders a row of individual input boxes for one-time password entry. Use it for SMS verification codes, email verification, two-factor authentication, and any numeric/alphanumeric code entry flow.
features: Auto-advance to next box on input
Paste support for the full code

usageExamples.title: SMS verification OTP
usageExamples.description: 6-digit OTP input for SMS phone verification.

usageExamples.title: 4-digit PIN entry
usageExamples.description: 4-digit PIN input for a payment confirmation screen.

usageExamples.title: OTP with auto-submit on complete
usageExamples.description: OTP that automatically submits when all boxes are filled.
usageExamples.code:
<OTPInput
  value={otp}
  onChange={(value) => {
    setOtp(value);
    if (value.length === 6) handleVerify(value);
  }}
  length={6}
  autoFocus
  disabled={isVerifying}
/>

value.llmContext: Required. The current OTP string value (e.g., '123456' for a filled 6-digit code, '12' for partially entered). Manage with useState initialized to empty string ''.

onChange.llmContext: Required. Called with the updated OTP string as the user types. The string length grows from 0 to the configured length as boxes are filled. Check value.length === length to detect completion.
onChange.propDescription: Required. Called with updated OTP string on input

length.llmContext: Number of OTP digit boxes to render. Common values: 4 for PINs, 6 for standard OTPs, 8 for longer codes. Match the exact length of the code your backend generates.

error.llmContext: Set to true when OTP verification fails to show error styling on all boxes. Always also show an error message text below the OTP input explaining the failure.
error.propDescription: Applies error styling to all OTP boxes

autoFocus.llmContext: Set to true to focus the first OTP box immediately on mount. Almost always use this for dedicated verification pages where OTP entry is the primary action — removes the need for the user to click the input.
autoFocus.propDescription: Auto-focuses the first OTP box on mount

disabled.llmContext: Set to true while the OTP is being verified after submission. Prevents the user from modifying the code while the verification API call is in progress.
disabled.propDescription: Prevents input while verification is in progress
